titleStmt.title: SII 9.123: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 123. (A.R. No. 392 of 1920.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE BHOGESVARA TEMPLE AT DONEKALLU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 981, Vikāri (A.D. 1059-60), with no other details. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva and mentions his feudatory the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chiddaṇṇa-Chōḷamahārāja as ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand. It records that, when the emperor went leading an expedition to the south, and when Saṅkarasa was ruling over Koṇḍakunde, two Brāhmans Chiddayya and Jakkayya occupied by force the umbaḷi land of Nijjara-Gāvuṇḍa, Chaḷika-Gāvuṇḍa and Chandaya-Gāvuṇḍa and continued to enjoy it for three years, the gāvuṇḍas resolved (to fall upon the Brāhmans) on the understanding that when any one of them died in the fight, the other two shoud give the heir of the dead hero one-third share more in addition to the share of the umbaḷi-land that came to his share. Nijjara-Gāvuṇḍa fought with the Brāhmans and fell dead and his son Māchi-Gāvuṇḍa was granted his share of the original land and one-third share more. Māchi-Gāvuṇḍa granted five mattars of land to Jakkōja, the iron-smith, and five mattars to Biṇṇōja, the carpenter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
traiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhividdhipravarddhamānamācandrā
rkatāraṁ saltamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti caraṇasarasīruha
vihataviḷōcanatriḷōcanapramukhākhiḷaprithvīśvarakaritakāvērī
tīra karikālakularatnapradīpa kumararaṁkuśanayyanasiṅgha kāṁcīpu
rasaṁharaṇakāraṇamahēśvara bāḷanārāyaṇa nāmādisama
stapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ ciddaṇnacōḷamahārāja
r sindavāḍi sāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanasukasaṁkathā
vinōdadi(ṁ)narasugayye . sakavarṣa 980 neya vikārisaṁvatsarada śrāhe
yoḷcakravartti dakṣiṇadiśāvarakke digvijayaṁgeydandu koṇḍakundeya maneya
saṁkarasanarasugeyye doḍḍakaḷihikalla ddhārmyada vittiya nijjaragāvuṇḍanu caḷika
gāvuṇḍanu candayagāvuṇḍanu tammāḷōcaneyi ciddayyanu jakkayya
nuveṁba pāruvaru guṇḍamayyaṁ dōṟi Eḍeyāylatanadiṁ rājagā
mitaṁgeydu meṇḍeyatanadalūranennadendu mūṟu variṣaduṇbaḷiya pō
gatoḻduṇutamirppudaṁ kaṇḍu nelavāḷu pākaṁbōpalli mūvaralōrvvar
sattaḍallade bhūmi nilladendu sattavarigu munnina bhāgamallada mattavondu
bhāgamu tējasāmyavittigā baḷa 10 koḷvudendu nuḍiyalār sāyalarmma
diḻdaḍe nijjaragāvuṇḍa sāva niścayageydu nimma nuḍidudanennamaga mācigāvu
ṇḍage makkaḷa makkaḷvara naḍeyisvudendu pūrvvada vitti pōpudarkke gāvuṇḍara koṭṭa
mattavoṁdu bhāgakke tējasāmya vitti kka pārvva ciddayya jakkayyage
nijjaragāvuṇḍaniṟidu koṇḍu sattu paḍeda baḷanondu mattu pūrvvada baḷanoṁdu
mācigāvuṇḍa jakkōjage kammaṟavāḷa koṭṭa keyi matta 5
baḍḍagivāḷa biṇnōjage koṭṭamatta 5 Akasālevāḷu bāḷige matta 5 .
Digital edition of SII 9.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
